title: TriageResult
description: Output schema for the CXR triage skill.

valid.description: True if the image is a usable chest X-ray (is_chest_xray=true AND quality_grade != non_diagnostic).

is_chest_xray.description: True if the image is any kind of chest radiograph.

quality_issues.description: List of detected quality issue tags.

quality_grade.description: Overall quality tier for the image.

triage_notes.description: Radiologist-style explanation of the triage decision.
